free_text: ORNL Van-de-Graaff, pulsed at 2 mhz and bunched.
D(d,n) reaction using gas cells ranging in length
from 0.7 to 4.0 cm. Neutron energy resolution between
Right circular cylinder 2.54 cm in diameter,2 cm long
placed 10 to 30 cm from gas cell
viewed by XP-1040 photomultiplers. Flight paths of 4
Corrected for multiple scattering and for finite size
. residual background effects due to peak stripping
Differential data do not (but integral data do)
include absolute error of +-7%, the estimated error
in the absolute value of the detector efficiency.
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
Uncertainty also includes absolute error of 7%, the
estimated error in the absolute value of the detector
